stories.headline: Trump administration pushes $250 bill with president's portrait on currency

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Breaking news: Trump administration officials have pressed the Bureau of Engraving and Printing to design a $250 bill featuring the president’s portrait, in what would be the first appearance of a living person on U.S. currency in more than 150 years.

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 🚨 Could President Trump Appear on a $250 Bill? 💵🇺🇸 Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says proposed legislation in Congress could pave the way for President Donald Trump to appear on a new $250 bill.

stories.headline: First trailer for the stop-motion film 'I AM FRANKELDA' releasing on Netflix.
stories.body:
First trailer for ‘I AM FRANKELDA’, the first-ever stop-motion film made in Mexico.

The film follows a writer who is taken to another realm to help write nightmares to keep monsters alive.

Releasing June 12 on Netflix.

stories.headline: Albino buffalo nicknamed 'Donald Trump' spared from sacrifice
stories.body: A rare albino buffalo in Bangladesh — nicknamed 'Donald Trump' for its distinctive blond tuft — has been spared from the Eid al-Adha sacrifice after a last-minute government intervention, and relocated to the capital’s main zoo https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/viral-fame-spares-donald-trump-buffalo-eid-sacrifice-bangladesh-2026-05-27/?utm_medium=Social&utm_source=Facebook

stories.headline: Justice Department launches criminal investigation into E. Jean Carroll
stories.body: The Justice Department has launched a criminal investigation into E. Jean Carroll, who accused Trump of sexual assault, according to sources https://www.cnn.com/2026/05/27/politics/exclusive-justice-department-launched-e-jean-carroll-investigation?Date=20260527&Profile=CNN&utm_content=1779924016&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

stories.headline: NBA passes new anti-tanking rules expanding lottery and adding penalties
stories.body: Breaking: The NBA's Board of Governors has passed new anti-tanking rules that include expanding the draft lottery from 14 to 16 teams, a relegation zone where the bottom 3 teams get penalized with lessened chances for the No. 1 pick, and flattened odds, sources tell ESPN.

stories.headline: Julián Álvarez informs Atlético of desire to leave with Barcelona priority
stories.body:
🚨 Julián Álvarez has already informed Atléti of his desire to leave with Barcelona as a clear priority.

Barça won’t stop here, planning for more signings after Gordon (done) and after talks for Álvarez (bid not sent yet, but soon).

stories.body: Cybercab driving itself out of the GigaTexas factory

stories.headline: SpaceX developing in-house AI training stack in C for massive speed gains.
stories.body:
SpaceX has almost finished writing V1.0 of an in-house AI training stack in C that exact-maps to 220k GB300s with 800G NICs, making heavy use of pipeline parallelism and getting as close to bare metal as possible.

The potential speed improvement vs JAX for large training runs is over an order of magnitude.

stories.headline: Elon Musk clarifies SpaceX lease terms with Anthropic.
stories.body:
SpaceX has not committed to leasing Colossus for years, although it’s possible that may be what happens.

This is a 180 day lease with 90 day notice mutual cancellation thereafter. The short term was our request, not Anthropic’s. 

We won’t leave them hanging and will provide a reasonable off-ramp, but if compute gets super tight I said we might need it back at some point.

stories.headline: Theo Von recounts humorous story about wetting the bed as an adult on podcast.
stories.body:
THEO VON: “Sometimes I used to wet the bed and I would be an adult, which was the saddest part of it.”

“There were times when I was supposed to get up in the morning... then I would urinate all over my phone, and it would short out.”

“And it would be like the best morning.”

stories.headline: Japanese chef shares simple popover bread recipe with basic ingredients.
stories.body:
日本がアメリカ料理ブームってことで『ポップオーバー』のレシピを教えちゃいます。
ポップオーバーとはシュークリームの
皮のように中が空洞で発酵が不要の即席で作れるパンです
材料は基本的に小麦粉・牛乳・卵・塩とシンプルで、外はカリッと中はモチっとしていて日本人は絶対好きなパンです🍞

stories.headline: SpaceX nearly completes in-house AI training stack for order-of-magnitude speed gains.
stories.body:
SpaceX has almost finished writing V1.0 of an in-house AI training stack in C that exact-maps to 220k GB300s with 800G NICs, making heavy use of pipeline parallelism and getting as close to bare metal as possible.

The potential speed improvement vs JAX for large training runs is over an order of magnitude.

stories.headline: Reactor raises $59M to launch real-time world model platform for AI developers.
stories.body:
Today Reactor is coming out of stealth. We’ve raised $59M in Seed and Series A funding, led by @lightspeedvp, with participation from @AmplifyPartners, @wndrco, @Sky9Capital, and @FPVventures.

Reactor is the platform for building in the World Model era: the infrastructure that lets developers build with them at global scale for the first time. Stream from a frontier World Model to your app, in real time, all in under 10 lines of code.

World Models represent the next major shift in AI: pixels, audio and actions are generated on the fly, in real-time, in response to user inputs, and to the environment. Every time computing has made a shift from passive to interactive, entire industries appeared that didn't exist before. We're standing in front of such moment again.

Over the last 6 months, we’ve assembled an all-star team with alumni from Apple, Meta, Google, Luma AI, Netflix, and Replicate. We're already partnering with some of the biggest names and labs in the world, and hundreds of developers are already building on Reactor.

The World Model era starts now.

stories.headline: Anthropic raises $65B at $965B valuation to advance Claude AI research.
stories.body:
We've raised $65 billion in Series H funding at a $965 billion post-money valuation, led by @AltimeterCap, Dragoneer, @Greenoaks, and @sequoia.

This investment will help us advance our research and expand our capacity to meet growing demand for Claude.

stories.headline: Evacuation of over 50,000 in Orange County California linked to chemical incident
stories.body:
They evacuated over 50,000 in Orange County California , including my immediate family that lives there and I said it sounds intentional and will happen somewhere else for sure.

Not 24 hours after I say that here she blows. It’s gonna happen again.😭😭😭

stories.headline: COVID permanently altered trust in institutions and conspiracy theories.
Prince discussed noticing chemtrails over his neighborhood.
stories.body:
Prince talked about how when he was younger he would notice chemtrails being sprayed over his neighborhood all the time.

He said he noticed soon after the chemtrails were sprayed - everyone in his neighborhood would suddenly be fighting and arguing
